name: Zhejiang Runyang New Material Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Runyang New Material Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of irradiation crosslinked polyolefin products in China, the United States, Canada, Japan, Germany, the United Kingdom, and internationally. The company offers polyethylene foams in the categories, such as WPCs and SPCs, coiled materials, and folds. Its products are used in application fields, including architecture, automobile, medical, processing craft, electronic field, mother and baby, and sports goods. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Huzhou, China.
